testcase.name: test_admin_users_rejects_non_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: non-admin should be rejected got 500 assert 500 in (401, 403) + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_actions.py:92: in test_admin_users_rejects_non_admin assert r.status_code in (401, 403), f"non-admin should be rejected got {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: non-admin should be rejected got 500 E assert 500 in (401, 403) E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
